name: Celery Seed Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Celery Seed OR Poppy Seed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, combine all ingredients except oil and seed.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. On low speed, continue blending while slowly adding oil.
4. Stir in the seeds.
5. Chill to blend flavors.
Makes about 1 cup.
Suggested Serving: Serve with various fresh fruit salads.
